name: claude-codex-bridge
description: Install and update the Claude-Codex bridge into a project or globally.

interface.shortDescription: Install the Claude Code <-> Codex bridge into a repo.
interface.longDescription: Adds the bridge files from this repository into a target project or globally, including MCP config, the codex-integration agent, the codex-review skill, and optional hook setup.
defaultPrompt: Install the full Claude-Codex bridge into this project.
Install only codex-review into this project.
Install the full bridge here and enable the hook.
